descFull: LuaN1aoAgent is a fully autonomous AI penetration testing agent driven by graph-based cognitive reasoning, developed by postgraduate researchers from Prof. Lu Hui's Intelligent Offensive and Defensive Security Team at the Institute of Cyberspace Security, Guangzhou University.
